## Summary

- 

## Motivation

- 

## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Test / CI improvement
- [ ] Refactor without behavior change
- [ ] Analysis / scoring behavior change
- [ ] Notification / output format change
- [ ] Runtime / operations change
- [ ] Security-related change

## Checks

- [ ] `git diff --check`
- [ ] Python compile check
- [ ] Unit tests or documented manual verification
- [ ] README / docs updated if behavior changed

## Security and safety

- [ ] No `.env`
- [ ] No API keys
- [ ] No SMTP passwords
- [ ] No private logs
- [ ] No private account identifiers
- [ ] No real exchange-side order execution enabled by default
- [ ] Output does not imply financial advice or guaranteed trading results

## Notes for reviewers

- Does this affect scoring, notification rank, or actionability?
- Does this affect public documentation or release identity?
- Does this require updating `VERSION`, README, or `.env.example`?
